message:
Fix CLI to output JSON in non-TTY/piped mode

- Updated show, categories, and tags commands to use shouldOutputJson()
  instead of just checking options.json flag
- This enables automatic JSON output when stdout is piped (non-TTY)
- Fixed filters.spec.ts to remove unnecessary waitForTimeout
- Improved filters.spec.ts to verify specific prompts instead of generic h3 count
- Updated show.test.ts to reflect new non-TTY behavior

Closes bead jeffreysprompts.com-xa4k

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
